name: zine-space
description: ZineSpace - 小众 zine 私印刊物共享平台

scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c red,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.seed: cd backend && npx prisma db push && node prisma/seed.js
scripts.reset: cd backend && rm -f prisma/dev.db && npx prisma db push && node prisma/seed.js
